title: Tealium Authentication Response
description: Schema for the response from the Tealium Authentication API. Contains a JWT bearer token valid for 30 minutes and a region-specific host for subsequent API calls.

token.description: JWT bearer token valid for 30 minutes. Include in Authorization header as 'Bearer {token}' for all subsequent API calls.

host.description: Region-specific host for subsequent API calls (e.g., us-east-1-platform.tealiumapis.com). Use this host rather than the generic platform.tealiumapis.com.
